name: specify-a-feature
when_to_use: When the user needs a concrete feature plan.
When the flow must gather context and drive implementation.

steps.description: Capture the feature goal and success criteria.
steps.details: Ask about outcomes, edge cases, tests, and constraints.

steps.description: Generate the system template and fill it out.
steps.details: Fill the system template before review.

steps.description: Review the system context before deciding the feature shape.
steps.details: Confirm requirements, approach, and constraints after fill.

steps.description: Generate the architecture template and fill it out.
steps.details: Capture the entity model before review.
Confirm model, relationships, invariants, and guidance after fill.

steps.description: Generate the implementation template and fill it out.
steps.details: Complete the template with decisions and reasoning.

steps.description: Decide on proposed PRs and fill each template.
steps.details: Fill PR templates with intent, criteria, tests, and risks.

steps.description: Prompt the user to review the result.
steps.details: Show the draft plan and confirm it still matches.
